project: use the arrow keys, x, y/spacebar to control the player
Something might be hiding in the trees...
Some enemies fire bullets, dodge and SHOOT BACK!
Be careful not to take an ACID BATH!
Careful ! the idle robots are invincible ! Try avoiding them.

This was an assignment project from which we had to make a 2D platformer game in our module Computer Game programming in the program we are currently persuing (2026) © made from our team: Jeconia, Dikshana and Ilhaan in the Construct 3 game making software.
